final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night Hangzhou itinerary, featuring a real map of Hangzhou as the main visual thread.

Style/medium: physical tri-fold brochure mockup, layered paper craft aesthetic with die-cut landmarks floating above cardstock base, editorial travel design, tactile paper textures
Subject: tri-fold travel brochure showing 4-day Hangzhou itinerary, famous scenic spots rendered as 3D pop-up landmarks (断桥残雪, 雷峰塔, 灵隐寺, 龙井村, 九溪烟树, 西溪湿地) suspended above the map background
Scene/backdrop: top-down flat-lay of the unfolded brochure on textured kraft paper, real Hangzhou city map as the base layer, tourist attractions as dimensional paper cutouts with subtle shadows
Composition: overhead flat-lay shot showing all three panels of the unfolded brochure, 35mm lens, even lighting to reveal map details and paper textures
Color palette: soft jade green and ink blue from West Lake imagery, warm cream paper tones, terracotta accents for landmark highlights
Materials/textures: matte cardstock with subtle fiber texture, vellum overlays for map details, dimensional foam adhesive creating lift for landmarks, visible paper grain
Text (verbatim): "第一天：西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南 ‌路线：断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 第二天：禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵 ‌路线：灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城 第三天：九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人 ‌路线：九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径 第四天：文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面 方案A：运河文艺线 拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺 方案B：西溪湿地轻奢游 周家村→深潭口→氦气球俯瞰湿地"
Constraints: brochure must show clear tri-fold crease lines; landmarks must correspond to actual Hangzhou geography; text must be legible at mockup scale; floating elements must cast subtle shadows suggesting depth
Avoid: generic stock travel poster look; overly glossy digital render; misplaced landmarks; cluttered text layout; Behance generic flat illustration style
